## Description / Excerpt

A path from fairness as a shared attractor to consent vectors, withdrawal pricing, gating functions, and automation that knows when to act or ask.

Excerpt:

This document traces a conceptual path from an intuitive human agreement—*“let’s just agree to be fair”*—to a systems-level insight: emotions cannot be priced, but **[consent](https://quantuminvariants.com/spine/primitives#P3) can be tracked**, and that tracking can itself govern
